rulings.Case Title: MICKEY Y WONG VS. DORIS WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Joiner In Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 01, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT BO WONG's Joinder In Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings DENIED. Nothing of the face of the complaint and/or judicially noticeable documents indicates that the fourth cause of action for quiet title (re: ownership of the property including properties for which Plaintiff is the sole title holder and property physically occupied by plaintiff) is barred by the statue of limitations. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICKEY Y WONG VS. DORIS WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 01, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT DORIS WONG's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS DENIED. To the extent this motion is based on CCP 438, it is denied as untimely. To the extent this is a non-statutory motion is it DENIED as follows: nothing on the face of the complaint and/or judicially noticeable documents indicates that the fourth cause of action for quiet title (re: ownership of the property, including properties for which Plaintiff is the sole legal title holder and property physically occupied by plaintiff) is barred by the statue of limitations. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD KARL BACKER VS. PAUL OFFENBACHER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Form, Special Interrogatories (Set 2), Response To Request For Production Of Documents (Sets 1,2) And Request Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 01, 2017, line 2. PLAINTIFF RICHARD BACKER's Motion To Compel Response To Form, Special Interrogatories (Set 2), Response To Request For Production Of Documents (Sets 1,2) And Request for Sanctions GRANTED. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections to Form and Special Interrogatories Set 2, Request for Production of Documents Sets 1 and 2 within 15 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $60. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NORMANDY MANOR LLC VS. MICHELLE ZAFFINO ET AL

rulings.Case Title: JIN PING CHEN MAK VS. JUAN CARLOS RAMIREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 01, 2017, line 9. DEFENDANT JUAN RAMIREZ, REBECCA SUVAL's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint DENIED. Defendants improperly challenge the sufficiency of the Notice alleged to have been served on the Defendants. Borsuk v. App. Div. of Sup. Ct. (2015) 242 Cal.App.4th 607. = (501/REQ)
